title: Creamy Saudic Rice Noodles Stir-fry
description: A fresh and creamy vegetarian-friendly brunch-mood dish featuring aromatic rice noodles in a rich sauce that's perfect for light meal options.

ingredients.name: 1 can (8 ounces) chickpeas, drained and rinsed

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic, sauté until translucent about 5 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a boil then reduce heat to low.
In a small bowl mix together heavy cream and lemon juice, set aside.
Add the mixture into the skillet with the chickpeas and stir well until creamy.
Stir in salt to taste and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
